message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Confirming driver status for a11y fixes">
Luca, you've been driving Step 8 the whole time -- are you still active and able to apply these two fixes? From the visual design side, neither of these changes affects the visual presentation (aria-labels are invisible, time element is semantic), so my approval still stands once they're applied. Just need you to confirm you're still driving.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Steve, confirmed -- I'm still driving. Both fixes are already applied, re-staged, and the pipeline is green (220 tests + 11 Playwright). Your approval is counted.

The only blocker is the GPG/SSH signing agent failing when I try to commit. I've escalated to the project owner and am waiting for them to fix the signing environment.
